---
title: "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density"
output:
  github_document: default
---

```{r setup-and-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel) 
library(SternBrocotPhysics) # The new package function lives here

# --- 1. Configuration & Data Load ---
dir_base_data_4TB <- "/Volumes/SanDisk4TB/SternBrocot-data"

# --- 1.2 Display Configuration ---
config_min_node_count <- 0
config_max_node_count <- 105
config_min_momentum <- 0.5
config_max_momentum <- 10.5

# Action bounds (A = P^2)
config_min_action <- 0
config_max_action <- 105

# Pipeline Directories
dir_01_raw_erasures           <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "01_harmonic_oscillator_erasures")
dir_02_densities              <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "02_harmonic_oscillator_densities")
dir_03_nodes                  <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "03_harmonic_oscillator_nodes")
dir_04_summary                <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "04_harmonic_oscillator_summary")

# Summary Files
file_04_summary_erasure_displacement <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_erasure_displacement_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_selected_microstate  <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_selected_microstate_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_sequence_length      <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_sequence_length_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_resonance_margin     <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_resonance_margin_summary.csv.gz")

# In-Memory Data Tables (Preserving your specific naming)
dt_summary_erasure_displacement <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_displacement)) fread(file_04_summary_erasure_displacement) else data.table()
dt_summary_selected_microstate <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_selected_microstate)) fread(file_04_summary_selected_microstate) else data.table()
dt_summary_sequence_length <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_sequence_length)) fread(file_04_summary_sequence_length) else data.table()
dt_summary_resonance_margin <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_resonance_margin)) fread(file_04_summary_resonance_margin) else data.table()

# --- 1.5 Physics Constants & Action Mapping ---
qho_zpe_offset <- 0.0

if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement)>0) dt_summary_erasure_displacement[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_selected_microstate)>0) dt_summary_selected_microstate[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length)>0) dt_summary_sequence_length[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_resonance_margin)>0) dt_summary_resonance_margin[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]

# --- 2. Auto-Selection Logic ---
row_0500 <- copy(dt_summary_erasure_displacement[abs(normalized_momentum - 0.500) < 1e-4])
if (nrow(row_0500) > 0) {
  row_0500 <- row_0500[1]
  row_0500[, node_count := 0]
}

valid_summaries <- dt_summary_erasure_displacement[!is.na(node_count) & node_count >= 0]
idx_closest_line <- valid_summaries[, .I[which.min(abs(action_A - (node_count + qho_zpe_offset)))], by = node_count]$V1
dt_line_picked <- valid_summaries[idx_closest_line]
dt_line_picked <- dt_line_picked[node_count != 0]
if(nrow(row_0500) > 0) dt_line_picked <- rbind(dt_line_picked, row_0500, fill = TRUE)
setorder(dt_line_picked, node_count)
dt_selected_line <- dt_line_picked[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & action_A >= config_min_action & action_A <= config_max_action]

# Downsample for the detailed grid plot
grid_target_nodes <- c(0, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100)
dt_selected_line_grid <- dt_selected_line[node_count %in% grid_target_nodes]

# FORCE INJECTION: The exact Ground State (A = 1.0)
row_1000 <- copy(dt_summary_erasure_displacement[abs(normalized_momentum - 1.000) < 1e-4])
if (nrow(row_1000) > 0) {
  row_1000 <- row_1000[1]
  dt_selected_line_grid <- rbind(dt_selected_line_grid[abs(action_A - 1.00) > 1e-4], row_1000, fill = TRUE)
}
setorder(dt_selected_line_grid, action_A)

dynamic_height_line <- max(5, nrow(dt_selected_line_grid) * 4.0 + 1)
```

```{r plot-2A-overview-scatter-erasure-displacement, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# --- Plot 2A: Overview Scatter Plot (Restored Original Logic) ---
qho_linear_backbone <- function(A) { A - qho_zpe_offset }

if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement) > 0) {
  dt_background_erasure_displacement <- dt_summary_erasure_displacement[
    !is.na(node_count) & 
    node_count >= config_min_node_count & 
    node_count <= config_max_node_count & 
    action_A >= config_min_action &
    action_A <= config_max_action
  ]
  dt_background_erasure_displacement[, snr_relative := frank(snr_metric, ties.method = "average") / .N, by = node_count]
  
  ggplot() +
    stat_function(fun = qho_linear_backbone, n = 1001, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = dt_background_erasure_displacement[order(snr_relative)], 
               aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, color = snr_relative), size = 1.5, alpha = 1.0) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "black", high = "grey85", name = "Local SNR\n(Percentile)") +  
    geom_point(data = dt_selected_line, aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, shape = "Linear Fit"), color = "black", size = 4.5, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(name = "Selection Method", values = c("Linear Fit" = 21)) +
    geom_text_repel(data = dt_selected_line, aes(x = action_A, y = node_count, label = sprintf("n=%d", node_count)),
                    size = 3, color = "black", fontface = "bold", family = "mono", box.padding = 0.3, point.padding = 0.5, max.overlaps = 15) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 10)) +
    labs(title = "Node Count vs Action: Erasure Displacement", x = "Action (A)", y = "Nodes (n)") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}
```

```{r plot-1A-grid-parabola, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=dynamic_height_line, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1A: Shared Plotting Engine (Refactored Surgical Replacement) ---
p_grid <- plot_erasure_grid(
  dt_meta = dt_selected_line_grid, 
  dir_raw = dir_01_raw_erasures, 
  dir_densities = dir_02_densities, 
  dir_nodes = dir_03_nodes,
  style = "readme",
  base_font = "",
  overarching_title = "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density (Linear Action Fit)"
)
print(p_grid)
```

```{r plot-3-sequence-length-evolution, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 3: Sequence Length Summary (Restored Original Logic) ---
if (nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length) > 0) {
  dt_filtered_prog_len <- dt_summary_sequence_length[action_A >= config_min_action & action_A <= config_max_action]
  ggplot(dt_filtered_prog_len, aes(x = action_A)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_len, ymax = max_len, fill = "Absolute Range"), alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = "±1 SD"), alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Variance", values = c("Absolute Range" = "grey90", "±1 SD" = "grey70")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_len, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_len, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 10)) +
    labs(title = "Thermodynamic Complexity vs Action", x = "Action (A)", y = "Sequence Length (N bits)") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

```{r generate_tree, echo=FALSE}
# --- Stern-Brocot Tree Data (RESTORED ORIGINAL COMPLEX LOGIC) ---
generate_tree <- function(max_depth) {
  nodes <- list(list(depth = 0, num = 0, den = 1, l_num = -1, l_den = 0, r_num = 1, r_den = 0, bin = "", parent_x = NA_real_, parent_y = NA_real_))
  all_nodes <- nodes
  for (d in 1:max_depth) {
    new_nodes <- list()
    for (node in nodes) {
      left_node <- list(depth = d, num = node$l_num + node$num, den = node$l_den + node$den, l_num = node$l_num, l_den = node$l_den, r_num = node$num, r_den = node$den, bin = paste0(node$bin, "0"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth)
      right_node <- list(depth = d, num = node$num + node$r_num, den = node$den + node$r_den, l_num = node$num, l_den = node$den, r_num = node$r_num, r_den = node$r_den, bin = paste0(node$bin, "1"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth)
      new_nodes <- append(new_nodes, list(left_node, right_node))
    }
    all_nodes <- append(all_nodes, new_nodes)
    nodes <- new_nodes
  }
  bind_rows(all_nodes) %>% mutate(x = num / den, y = depth, frac_label = paste0(num, "/", den), bin_label = ifelse(bin == "", "(zero bits)", bin))
}
max_k <- 4
tree_data <- generate_tree(max_k)
```

```{r plot_tree, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=8, dpi=300}
# --- Stern-Brocot Tree Plot (RESTORED ORIGINAL PATH HIGHLIGHTING) ---
target_bin <- "1101"
invert_bit <- function(s) { chars <- unlist(strsplit(s, "")); paste(ifelse(chars == "1", "0", "1"), collapse = "") }
reverse_string <- function(s) { paste(rev(unlist(strsplit(s, ""))), collapse = "") }
s_star_full <- invert_bit(reverse_string(target_bin))
path_bins <- sapply(0:nchar(target_bin), function(i) substr(target_bin, 1, i))

path_data <- tree_data %>% 
  filter(bin %in% path_bins) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bits_popped = nchar(target_bin) - nchar(bin), 
         erase_str = ifelse(!is.na(parent_x), substr(s_star_full, bits_popped + 1, nchar(s_star_full)), ""),
         erase_label = ifelse(erase_str != "", paste0("s*=", erase_str), ""),
         mid_x = (x + parent_x) / 2, mid_y = (y + parent_y) / 2) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(tree_data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = parent_x, yend = parent_y), color = "gray85", linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(color = "gray75", size = 2) +
  geom_segment(data = path_data, aes(xend = parent_x, yend = parent_y), color = "black", linewidth = 1.2, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.15, "inches"), type = "closed"), na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_point(data = path_data, color = "black", size = 3.5) +
  geom_label(data = filter(path_data, erase_label != ""), aes(x = mid_x, y = mid_y, label = erase_label), family = "mono", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5, color = "white", fill = "black", label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.2, "lines")) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(label = frac_label), direction = "x", nudge_y = 0.15, segment.color = "gray85", segment.size = 0.2, size = 3.5, color = "black", fill = "white", label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"), vjust = 0, box.padding = 0.1, max.overlaps = Inf) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(label = bin_label), direction = "x", nudge_y = -0.15, segment.color = "gray85", segment.size = 0.2, size = 3.5, family = "mono", color = "black", fill = "white", label.size = NA, label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"), vjust = 1, box.padding = 0.1, max.overlaps = Inf) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 0:max_k, limits = c(-0.3, max_k + 0.3), name = "Sequence Length (N bits)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = -4:4, name = "Coordinate (q)", expand = expansion(mult = 0.05)) +
  theme_minimal() + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16)) +
  labs(title = "Selected Microstate Information Tree (-Inf to +Inf)", subtitle = "Highlighting the thermodynamic erasure sequence for q_mu = 5/3")
```
